column1: select h_i_WdID WdID_by_id, h_i_Wd2 Wd_by_id, h_w_WdID WdID_by_wd, h_w_Wd2 Wd_by_wd, hx.WdID hWdID, hx.PoSID hPosID, hx.MnID hMnID, hx.exid hExID, hx.Wd2 hWd, x_WdID WdID, x_Wd Wd, x_SID SID, x_SoundFile SoundFile, x_Ex Ex, x_IPA IPA, x_Trs Trs from (select s1.*, h_w.WdID h_w_WdID, h_w.Wd2 h_w_Wd2 from (select x.WdID x_WdID, x.Wd x_Wd, x.SID x_SID, x.SoundFile x_SoundFile, x.Ex x_Ex, x.IPA x_IPA, x.Trs x_Trs, h_i.WdID h_i_WdID, h_i.Wd2 h_i_Wd2 from examples as x left join headwords as h_i on x_WdID = h_i.WdID group by h_i.WdID, x.WdID, x.Ex) as s1 left join headwords as h_w on x_Wd = h_w.Wd2 group by h_w.WdID, h_i_WdID, x_WdID, x_Ex) left join headword_exs as hx on x_Ex = hx.Ex group by hx.WdID, hx.PoSID, hx.MnID, hx.exid, h_w_WdID, h_i_WdID, x_WdID, x_Ex having Wd_by_id <> Wd_by_wd order by WdID asc, SID asc;
